name: Petrolatum
restriction_text: Not permitted except if the full refining history is known and it can be shown that the substance from which it is produced is not a carcinogen

name: Isobutane
restriction_text: Not permitted if substance contains ≥ 0.1% (w/w) Butadiene

name: Acrylamide
restriction_text: Unless regulated elsewhere in this Regulation
